"'''Le facteur X'''" was a roleplaying adventure in the French gaming magazine [[Casus Belli (magazine)|''Casus Belli'']]. It was written by [[Philippe Rat]] and [[Mehdi Sahmi]] and illustrated by [[Stéphane Levallois]].

==Plot summary==
The adventure began in the [[Rebellion era]], just prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. A [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] for the Imperial-aligned corporation [[Flight Unlimited Group]] got word to the Rebel Alliance of a prototype starship called the ''[[Trait Luminique]]''. The Alliance were prepared to send only a small team to rescue the scientist and steal the ship at the same time. However, when escaping in the experimental ship, the Rebels somehow traveled back in time to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. The rest of the adventure is set in this period, with the players having various encounters in this period.

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 1998-08-XX -->[[Casus Belli 115|''Casus Belli'' 115]]

==Appearances==
In addition to creating many new locations and characters, the article also made use of the [[West End Games]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], suggesting various groups that could aid the characters during the Rebellion era segment.
